final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing avatar icon for a social media account covering new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: icon / avatar, flat or semi-flat illustration
Composition: centered, balanced
Subject: visual elements representing new energy vehicles, digital gadgets, and lifestyle products
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: culturally neutral and universally harmonious across both Chinese and international social platforms; must avoid symbols, gestures, colors, or imagery that may be offensive or taboo to any specific cultural or religious group
Avoid: flags, political symbols, religious icons, culturally specific gestures, text-heavy design
